advisory_note: Generally safe; exercise normal precautions, higher gun-violence and petty crime in some cities.
vpn_note: VPNs fully legal and widely used.
decryption_note: No general key-disclosure law; courts split on Fifth Amendment, border agents may compel device unlock.
surveillance_note: No mandatory SIM registration; NSA/FBI bulk collection programs exist.
photography_note: Avoid photographing military bases and some federal facilities.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection on inbound and outbound passengers via CBP.
biometric_entry_note: CBP biometric facial-recognition entry/exit expanding at airports for foreign nationals.

advisory_note: Safe; normal precautions, terrorism threat rated substantial.
decryption_note: RIPA s49: failure to disclose keys carries up to 2 yrs (5 yrs national-security/CSA cases).
surveillance_note: Investigatory Powers Act mandates bulk data retention; extensive CCTV.
photography_note: Few restrictions; avoid military/government installations.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection; Border Force advance passenger data.
biometric_entry_note: ETA scheme rolling out; biometric e-gates at major airports.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
decryption_note: No explicit key-disclosure law; border officers (CBSA) may demand device passwords.
surveillance_note: No SIM registration; CSE signals intelligence under lawful authorization.
photography_note: Few restrictions; avoid military sites.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection (CBSA) on inbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric (fingerprint) collection required for many visa applicants.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
decryption_note: Crimes Act s3LA & Assistance and Access Act 2018 can compel decryption; refusal up to 10 yrs.
surveillance_note: Prepaid SIM identity registration required; mandatory metadata retention.
photography_note: Few restrictions; avoid defence sites.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection on inbound and outbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: SmartGate biometric processing; facial-recognition expansion.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
decryption_note: Customs and Excise Act 2018: must provide device access on demand at border; up to NZ$5000 fine.
surveillance_note: No SIM registration; GCSB signals intelligence (Five Eyes).
photography_note: Few restrictions.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection on inbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: SmartGate biometric e-gates; NZeTA required for visa-waiver visitors.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
decryption_note: Criminal Justice Act provisions can compel disclosure of passwords under warrant.
surveillance_note: No SIM registration mandate.
photography_note: Few restrictions.
biometric_entry_note: Not in Schengen; manual passport checks, no EES.

advisory_note: Safe; normal precautions, elevated terrorism threat and pickpocketing in cities.
decryption_note: Penal Code art.434-15-2: refusing to surrender decryption keys up to 3 yrs and EUR 270k.
surveillance_note: SIM registration required; broad intelligence surveillance law (2015).
photography_note: Avoid military/sensitive government sites.
biometric_entry_note: Schengen EES biometric entry/exit system rolling out 2025.

advisory_note: Safe; normal precautions.

surveillance_note: SIM registration with ID required since 2017.
photography_note: Avoid military sites; strict personality-rights limit photographing people.
biometric_entry_note: Schengen EES biometric entry/exit rolling out 2025.

advisory_note: Reconsider travel; arbitrary detention, exit bans, extensive surveillance.
vpn_note: Only government-approved VPNs legal; unauthorized VPNs blocked, fines for individuals.
decryption_note: Counter-Terrorism & Cybersecurity laws compel decryption assistance; border device searches.
surveillance_note: Real-name + facial-recognition SIM registration; pervasive state surveillance.
photography_note: Avoid military, government, protest scenes; can result in detention.
apis_pnr_note: Collects advance passenger data; extensive entry screening.
biometric_entry_note: Fingerprints collected from most foreign visitors on entry.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
decryption_note: No general key-disclosure obligation.
surveillance_note: SIM/identity verification required to buy local SIM.
photography_note: Few restrictions; avoid military bases.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection on inbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: Fingerprint and facial photo collected from foreign visitors on entry.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions.
vpn_note: VPNs legal; some content filtering exists.
decryption_note: No general key-disclosure obligation.
surveillance_note: Real-name SIM registration required.
photography_note: Avoid military sites and the DMZ except where permitted.
apis_pnr_note: Runs API/PNR collection on inbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: Fingerprint and facial photo collected from foreign visitors on entry; K-ETA.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; petty crime, regional unrest, sexual assault risk.
vpn_note: VPNs legal but CERT-In rules require providers to log user data; many cut servers.
decryption_note: IT Act s69 can compel decryption; refusal up to 7 yrs imprisonment.
surveillance_note: Aadhaar-linked SIM registration; expanding state surveillance.
photography_note: Prohibited near military, airports, bridges, dams, border areas.
apis_pnr_note: Implementing API/PNR collection on inbound travellers.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric data collected from many visa applicants; e-Visa biometrics at entry.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; terrorism, natural disasters, regional unrest in Papua.
vpn_note: VPNs legal but government blocks many sites; some VPNs filtered.
decryption_note: ITE Law can be used to compel access during investigations.
surveillance_note: SIM registration linked to national ID and family card numbers.
photography_note: Avoid military/government sites; Aceh enforces strict morality laws.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric collection on entry expanding; e-VOA available.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; unrest in far-south provinces, lese-majeste laws.
vpn_note: VPNs legal but heavy content censorship under Computer Crime Act.
decryption_note: Computer Crime Act can compel data/decryption assistance.
surveillance_note: Biometric (facial/fingerprint) SIM registration required.
photography_note: Avoid royal palaces' sensitive areas, military sites; respect lese-majeste.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric collection at entry; TDAC/arrival card required.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; one-party state, arbitrary enforcement, censorship.
vpn_note: VPNs technically legal but Cybersecurity Law restricts use; data localization required.
decryption_note: Cybersecurity Law compels providers/users to surrender data and decryption.
surveillance_note: SIM registration linked to national ID with photo/biometric.
photography_note: Avoid military and government installations.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric collection at entry expanding; e-Visa available.

advisory_note: Very safe; normal precautions, strict laws with severe penalties.
vpn_note: VPNs legal; circumventing content blocks can breach copyright/other laws.
decryption_note: Criminal Procedure Code s39/40 compels decryption; refusal punishable.
surveillance_note: SIM registration with ID required; extensive CCTV.
photography_note: Avoid military and protected places (signposted).
biometric_entry_note: Iris/fingerprint biometric clearance; SG Arrival Card required.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; risk in east Sabah coastal area (kidnapping).
vpn_note: VPNs legal; content censorship under Communications Act.
decryption_note: Investigative powers can compel data access in some cases.
surveillance_note: SIM registration with ID; biometric verification expanding.
photography_note: Avoid military/government sites; Sharia in some states.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric collection at entry; MDAC digital arrival card required.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; terrorism/kidnapping risk in parts of Mindanao.
decryption_note: Cybercrime Prevention Act allows data preservation/disclosure orders.
surveillance_note: Mandatory SIM Registration Act (2022) with ID; photo required.
photography_note: Avoid military sites and conflict zones.
apis_pnr_note: Collects advance passenger data; eTravel arrival registration.
biometric_entry_note: Biometric collection at entry; eTravel card required.

advisory_note: Exercise increased caution; strict laws, social media offenses, arbitrary detention.
vpn_note: VPNs legal for licensed use but using one to commit any offense is heavily fined.
decryption_note: Cybercrime laws compel access; device searches at border common.
surveillance_note: Biometric SIM registration; pervasive state surveillance and VoIP blocks.
photography_note: Avoid government, military, palaces; photographing people without consent illegal.
biometric_entry_note: Iris/facial biometric collection at entry; smart gates.

advisory_note: Reconsider travel; strict Sharia law, terrorism, missile/drone risk near Yemen.

decryption_note: Anti-cybercrime law compels access; device inspection at border.
surveillance_note: Biometric (fingerprint) SIM registration; extensive surveillance.
photography_note: Avoid government, military, palaces; people photos need consent.
biometric_entry_note: Fingerprint and facial biometrics collected at entry.
